summary: Full-stack testing of the Jayganesh Lavange DBA portfolio. Backend: 9/9 pytest cases pass for /api/contact (POST happy path, validation, GET newest-first, no _id leakage) and health. Frontend: All requested flows validated — loading screen dismisses, hero content, 4 LinkedIn CTAs open in new tab, theme toggle, resume download (both hero & contact), 6 nav anchors scroll into view with Lenis, contact form (valid & invalid) with sonner toasts and form clearing, back-to-top. Sections render expected counts (8 skill cards, 4 project GitHub links, 6 blog posts).
critical_code_review_comments: Contact GET orders by ISO string created_at which happens to work for UTC — safe here, but ideally sort by a real datetime field for future-proofing.

downloadResume() ships a .txt blob generated in the browser, not a real PDF/DOCX resume. Functionally satisfies 'triggers download' but recruiters expect a proper PDF. Consider adding a static resume file under /public.
PROFILE.email/phone are placeholder values ('jayganesh.lavange@example.com', '+91 90000 00000'). Should be replaced with real contact info before shipping.
No rate limiting or spam protection (captcha/honeypot) on public POST /api/contact — production risk.
Contact form does client-side pre-validation but relies on toast rather than inline field errors; acceptable but not accessible-friendly.
server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('shutdown') — should migrate to lifespan handlers (Starlette 0.30+/FastAPI recommendation).
seed_data_creation: Created several TEST_ prefixed contact records via API + one via UI (form submission) to validate persistence and newest-first ordering. Data remains in test_database.contact_messages.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_contact.py and use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from frontend/.env. Public URL: https://job-magnet-10.preview.emergentagent.com. All frontend flows use data-testid selectors defined in Hero.jsx, Chrome.jsx, Contact.jsx. Loading screen has fixed 1.6s timer; wait ~2.2s before interacting. Lenis smooth scroll makes anchor scrolls take ~2s to settle. Sonner toasts are queried via [data-sonner-toast]. Downloads use blob URLs (filename: Jayganesh_Lavange_DBA_Resume.txt).
